event: purulent drainage from sinuses on the scalp
oxygen saturation of 98% on room air
oriented to person and place, but not to time
face, scalp and right ear were erythematous and edematous
large fluctuant mass with purulent drainage over the occipital and parietal portions of the scalp
posterior auricular mass without signs of active drainage
anion gap metabolic acidosis with serum bicarbonate of 20
non-contrast head computed tomography (CT) showed extensive multifocal scalp swelling
admitted to the intensive care unit
incision and drainage of scalp lesion
10-cm subgaleal abscess with large amounts of purulence evacuated
initial admission blood cultures grew MRSA
paranasal sinus CT with intravenous contrast did not show involvement
transesophageal echocardiogram without evidence for endocarditis
scalp wound ultimately measured 20 cm in length, 10 cm in width and 2 cm depth
right posterior auricular wound measured 7 × 7 × 2 cm
split-thickness skin grafts harvested from the right thigh
100% take of the grafts on postoperative day 7
intravenous Vancomycin to complete a full 7-week course
